scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && esbuild src/content-script-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist/content.js --external:browser && esbuild src/background-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist/background.js --external:browser && esbuild src/popup-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist/popup.js --external:browser && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp -r icons dist/icons && node scripts/verify-build-output.mjs
scripts.dev: echo "Safari extension dev workflow is not implemented yet"
